trait.name: Zaku Squad Tactics
trait.description: +5% ATK per other Zaku-family unit alive on the enemy side. Bonus drops when only 1 enemy remains.

trait.name: Minovsky Particle Interference
trait.description: Player Ranged-category damage -15% while 2+ enemies are alive. Drops once only 1 enemy remains.

enemyUnits.name: Char's Zaku II

passive.name: The Red Comet
passive.description: If Char acts before all 3 player units in a round, gains +10% ATK for that round.

basic.name: Triple Speed Slash
basic.description: Standard melee hit on a single target.

special.name: Bazooka Precision Shot
special.description: 1.8× ATK on one target, ignores 30% of target's DEF.

ultimate.name: Red Comet Charge
ultimate.description: 2.5× ATK on one target + ATK Down and SPD Down for 2 turns.

introLines: "Aren't you ace pilots making this too easy? Newtype... or just talented..."
"I am Char Aznable! This is the price of your arrogance!"

enemyUnits.name: Gaia's Gouf

passive.name: Jet Stream Attack
passive.description: Summons 2 Zaku II tokens when Gaia's Gouf drops below 60% HP. If both tokens are alive when Special is used, damage increases by 20%.

basic.name: Heat Rod Whip
basic.description: Standard melee hit on a single target.

special.name: Tri-Star Formation Strike
special.description: 2.0× ATK on one target + ATK Down for 2 turns. +20% damage if both tokens alive.

ultimate.name: Black Tri-Stars Overwhelming Force
ultimate.description: 0.9× ATK on all player units + DEF Down to all for 2 turns.

introLines: "Heh heh heh... let's see what the Black Tri-Stars can really do!"

enemyUnits.name: M'Quve's Gyan

passive.name: Noble Stratagem
passive.description: 25% chance to negate incoming Special Attack damage.

basic.name: Beam Saber Thrust
basic.description: Standard melee hit on a single target.

special.name: Needle Missile Volley
special.description: 0.7× ATK on all player units + DoT to all for 1 turn.

ultimate.name: Gyan's Final Gambit
ultimate.description: 2.3× ATK on one target + ATK Down and DEF Down for 2 turns.

introLines: "Hmph. Sending children to fight is the Federation's specialty."
"I didn't come this far to lose to the likes of you!"

enemyUnits.name: Ramba Ral's Gouf Custom

passive.name: This is no Zaku, boy
passive.description: Immune to SPD Down status effect.

basic.name: Gatling Shield Burst
basic.description: Standard hit on a single target.

special.name: Heat Rod Electrocution
special.description: 1.6× ATK on one target + DoT AND ATK Down for 2 turns.

ultimate.name: Soldier's Pride
ultimate.description: 0.9× ATK on all player units + DEF Down to all for 2 turns.

phases.description: Ramba Ral's composure cracks — he fights now with desperate conviction.

introLines: "A real soldier... fights to the very end."
"Let me show you the difference experience makes, boy!"

introLines: "Newtype or not, you cannot win against thirty years of hatred!"
"I am Char Aznable! I will end this — for Lalah, for everyone!"
